query:
-- Check octane_customer_links for Zambrero sites
SELECT ocl.msisdn, ocl.octaneServiceName, ocl.octaneCustomerId, ocl.octaneCustomerName,
       ocl.internalCustomerExternalId, ocl.internalCustomerName, ocl.isZambreroService
FROM octane_customer_links ocl
WHERE ocl.octaneServiceName LIKE '%Zambrero%' OR ocl.isZambreroService = 1
ORDER BY ocl.octaneServiceName
LIMIT 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute

FROM octane_customer_links ocl
WHERE ocl.octaneServiceName LIKE '%Zambrero%' OR ocl.isZambreroService = 1
ORDER BY ocl.octaneServiceName
LIMIT 20;
